items.title: Nintendo Super Mario Luigi Paint Splatter Action T-Shirt T-Shirt
items.idea_prompt: Create an original, text-forward T-shirt design around: nintendo, super, mario, luigi, paint, splatter, action. Use clear fonts and simple iconography. Avoid trademarks.
